Player Warps

Quick list of player warps. Click to copy warp name.

mihu-farm

ActiveGuide

Mega farm for crops and resources - maintained regularly.

mihu-rentals

ActiveGuide

Item rentals, mostly tools and blocks - follow posted rules.

mihu-shop

UpcomingGuide

Community shop + Blossom Items - opening soon with trades.

mihu-casino

UpcomingGuide

Mini-games, events, giveaways - fair play required.
